vibe: Board-room / Investor-deck grade. A sophisticated dark analytics terminal that feels like a Bloomberg terminal redesigned by a luxury watchmaker. Dense, high-contrast, optical clarity.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Flat background (rgba(255,255,255,0.02)), 1px border (rgba(255,255,255,0.08)), rounded-none or rounded-sm, shadow-none. On hover: border-white/20, shadow-lg.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.kpi_cards: Use 'Tracing Beam' inspired top border. 1px solid #D4AF37 on top edge only to anchor the data.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.filter_bar: Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050808]/70) sticky at top z-40, 1px border-b border-white/10, py-4.

tabs.customization: Remove Vercel/Shadcn bubble look. Use underline style: transparent background, border-b border-white/10. Active tab gets text-brand-primary and border-b-2 border-brand-primary. font-headings text-lg.

select.customization: Square edges (rounded-none), bg-transparent, border-white/10. text-sm. Hover: border-white/20.

table.customization: Dense rows. No alternating background. border-b border-white/5 on rows. Hover row: bg-white/5. Data font (JetBrains Mono) for numerical columns. Right-align numerical columns.

layout.description: Group By and Time Period selects side-by-side in filter_bar.
Horizontal Bar Chart showing top N groups. Height: 400px.
Donut Chart with inner text showing total. Height: 400px.
Ranked table mapping to the charts.
Period A, Period B, Group By selectors in filter_bar.
Shows absolute delta and %. Uses positive/negative status colors.
Grouped Vertical Bar chart (Period A vs B per group). Height: 450px.
Delta table showing side-by-side values and variance.

interactions_and_motion.page_load: Fade in with staggered upward translation (framer-motion, y: 20 -> 0, duration: 0.4s).
interactions_and_motion.hover: Row hover in tables dims other rows slightly (opacity-50) and highlights current row. Chart hover highlights specific bar/slice and dims rest.

accessibility.aria: Include aria-labels for all charts and custom tooltips.

instructions_to_main_agent: Replace 'Inter' completely. Inject Cabinet Grotesk, Satoshi, and JetBrains Mono via Google Fonts or Fontshare CDN in index.html or global CSS.
Make the background of the main wrapper #050808.
Do NOT use heavy gradients or purple/teal washes. Keep it stark, dark, and illuminated by the Gold/Amber chart data.
Format all currency values as '₹X.XX L' or '₹X.XX Cr' using JetBrains Mono.
Build the 'Filter Bar' as a sticky glassmorphism nav below the main header.
For Shadcn Tabs, strip out the standard 'bg-muted' and rounded pill styles. Apply a classic flat underline tab style.
Ensure the charts have responsive containers.
